title: Vacation to Japan Help
wikitext: []: Vacation to Japan Help             Quote Post by PainXIII12 » Sun Aug 10, 2025 12:35 pm Hey everyone. I'm heading to Japan late September and I am making a special trip to Ube. I'm sure you're all well aware that this is Anno's hometown and the place where the final scene in all of Evangelion takes place. However I'm having trouble finding other things to do down there so if anyone knows any specific locations that are in Ube featured in any of Anno's works (Shin Kamen Rider, Shin Ultraman, Love and Pop, Shiki Jitsu, Extra Curricular lesson with Hideaki Anno, etc etc) (Which I imagine there are many) I'd like specifics please. Any help would be greatly appreciated.

Article: Vacation to Japan Help
[]: Vacation to Japan Help             Quote Post by PainXIII12 » Sun Aug 10, 2025 12:35 pm Hey everyone. I'm heading to Japan late September and I am making a special trip to Ube. I'm sure you're all well aware that this is Anno's hometown and the place where the final scene in all of Evangelion takes place. However I'm having trouble finding other things to do down there so if anyone knows any specific locations that are in Ube featured in any of Anno's works (Shin Kamen Rider, Shin Ultraman, Love and Pop, Shiki Jitsu, Extra Curricular lesson with Hideaki Anno, etc etc) (Which I imagine there are many) I'd like specifics please. Any help would be greatly appreciated.
